value:
Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry to hear you're experiencing battery drain issues with iOS 11 on your iPhone 6. I'd like to help you get this sorted.

To better understand what's happening and suggest the right fixes, could you tell me a bit more about when you first noticed the drain—was it right after updating to iOS 11, or did it develop over time? Also, have you noticed if any particular apps or activities seem to trigger it?

In the meantime, a few quick things often help: restarting your phone, checking Settings > Battery to see which apps are using the most power, and making sure you're on the latest iOS 11 version. Let me know what you find, and we'll take it from there.
